articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: 2 US service members missing after military exercises in Morocco - NPR
articles.description: Two U.S. service members are missing in southwestern Morocco after taking part in annual multinational military exercises in the North African country, the United States Africa Command (AFRICOM) said.
articles.content: CASABLANCA, Morocco Two U.S. service members are missing in southwestern Morocco after taking part in annual multinational military exercises in the North African country, the United States Africa Co… [+2553 chars]
